name: agent-skills
description: Production-grade capability skills for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex). Battle-tested skills covering cloud infrastructure (DNS migration with cloudflare-dns, Namecheap XML API management with namecheap-dns, full Fly-to-AWS migration), research and intelligence (deep-research across 8 sources in parallel), viral content creation (terminal-poster infographics), and dev workflow (clean-sweep autonomous multi-agent codebase clean-sweep, spec-to-ship autonomous frozen-spec-to-shipped-product build). MIT licensed.
